display.purpose: Rare large moments only (auth screens, a standout figure). Not for routine chrome.

headline.purpose: Major page identity where a page wants weight.

title.purpose: Section and card headings; the in-app workhorse heading.

body.purpose: Default reading text, capped at 65-75ch. Restrained 15px base for dense views.

label.purpose: Field labels, badges, metadata. 13px accessible floor.

numeric.purpose: Amounts and balances in SF Mono; digits align in columns.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Resting state for cards. Whisper-soft ambient lift.

shadows.name: accent-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA only. The one permitted colored shadow; reinforces the One Signal Rule.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The primary call to action. The only button that carries the forest accent glow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; background: #15803d; color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 1rem; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(21 128 61 / 0.25); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #166534; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px #15803d; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action that still wants the accent's authority. No glow.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; background: transparent; color: #15803d; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #15803d; border-radius: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgb(21 128 61 / 0.1); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px #15803d; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis action. Always carries a 1px border so it never floats borderless on a colored surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; background: transparent; color: #0f172a; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f8fafc; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px #15803d; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Sharp-cornered field, the deliberate ledger edge. Focus shifts the border to Forest Signal with a soft ring.
components.css: .ds-input-field { height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; background: #ffffff; color: #0f172a; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-input-field::placeholder { color: rgb(15 23 42 / 0.4); } .ds-input-field:focus-visible { border-color: #15803d; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgb(21 128 61 / 0.25); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Gently rounded container that earns separation from a 1px border and a whisper-soft resting shadow. Never nested.
components.html:
Groceries

Rp 1,240,000

82% of budget
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 1.75rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05), 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.03); } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 0.5rem; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; } .ds-card-amount { margin: 0 0 0.25rem; font-family: 'SF Mono', Monaco, monospace; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 500; color: #0f172a; } .ds-card-meta { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #475569; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Compact status tag. Status variants always include a word, never color alone.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 9999px; background: #f1f5f9; color: #0f172a; } .ds-badge-warning { background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item (active)
components.description: Active navigation item: the one sanctioned colored leading indicator in the system. 2px Forest Signal left border plus a faint accent gradient wash.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.625rem 1rem; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #475569; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #f8fafc; } .ds-nav-item-active { color: #15803d; font-weight: 600; border-left: 2px solid #15803d; background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgb(21 128 61 / 0.1) 0%, rgb(21 128 61 / 0) 100%); } .ds-nav-dot { width: 22px; height: 22px; display: inline-block; border-radius: 9999px; background: currentColor; opacity: 0.18; }

narrative.overview: Allowealth carries the quiet composure of a good accountant's hand. Money is stressful, so the interface never adds to the noise: figures are honest and exact, surfaces are calm, and nothing shouts. The green pen comes out only when it matters. Restraint is not the absence of design here, it is the design. This is a product register and a Restrained color system: tinted slate neutrals carry the surface, and a single forest-green accent (Forest Signal) appears on roughly a tenth of any screen. Two themes are first-class: a bright light mode for daytime glances and a comfortable, glare-free dark mode for late-night reviews. Components feel refined and restrained, with a deliberate tension: fields are sharp-cornered for ledger-like precision while buttons are softly rounded so the call to action feels approachable.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained palette: tinted slate neutrals plus one forest-green signal.
Forest Signal appears on ≤10% of any screen; its rarity is the point.
Flat by default; depth comes from tonal layering, not heavy shadows.
Sharp fields, soft buttons: a deliberate precision/approachability tension.
Exact numbers in a tabular monospace; honesty over flattery.
WCAG 2.1 AA in both themes; color is never the only signal.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Forest Signal covers ≤10% of any given screen. It marks the single most important action or the on-track state, nothing else. If two greens compete on one view, one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: Never #000 or pure #fff as a working text/border value. Neutrals are slate, tinted cool. Surfaces step tonally (base -> raised -> edge), 6-10% luminance apart, so elevation reads without a shadow.

rules.name: The Honest Color Rule
rules.body: Status color always pairs with text or an icon. A red number is never the only signal that a budget is blown.

rules.name: The Tabular Money Rule
rules.body: Currency and quantitative figures use the monospace stack so digits align in columns. Prose never uses it.

rules.name: The 13px Floor Rule
rules.body: No text smaller than 13px, ever. Hierarchy comes from weight and scale, not from shrinking labels into illegibility.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest and earn elevation through tone and border, not shadow. A shadow above --shadow-sm is a response to state, never a default decoration.

dos: Do keep Forest Signal to ≤10% of any screen: one primary action, on-track status, focus, active nav.
Do render money and comparable figures in the SF Mono stack so digits align in columns.
Do build depth from the tonal surface ramp and 1px borders before reaching for a shadow.
Do give buttons explicit rounded-2xl (16px) and keep fields sharp (0 radius). The tension is intentional.
Do pair every status color with a word or icon; never signal over budget with red alone.
Do maintain both themes as first-class; light uses 600-700 tokens for AA, dark desaturates to 400.
Do keep text at 13px or larger and build hierarchy through weight and scale.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion; motion is feedback, never required to understand state.
donts: Don't gamify. No confetti, badges-as-rewards, streaks, dopamine nudges, or mascots.
Don't build an enterprise banking dashboard: no dense gray corporate chrome, no clutter.
Don't reach for generic SaaS cliches: no cream-and-purple gradients, no hero-metric card rows, no identical icon-heading-text grids.
Don't go crypto/neon: no neon-on-black, no glowing gradient surfaces, no hype.
Don't use a colored side-stripe border (>1px) on cards, list items, callouts, or alerts. The 2px Forest Signal indicator is permitted on the active nav item only.
Don't use background-clip: text gradient text. Emphasis comes from weight and size in a single solid color.
Don't apply decorative glassmorphism or large backdrop-blur on fixed/always-visible surfaces; use near-opaque fills and radial-gradient instead.
Don't let a second green compete with Forest Signal, nest cards, or drop a shadow heavier than --shadow-sm at rest.
